rationale: Educ. Code §29.255 governs state funding for community education programs and contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13. No conflict exists.
quote: Funds shall be appropriated to implement statewide community education programs, including pilot programs to demonstrate the effectiveness of the community education concept.
_note: No textual or operational relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this community education funding statute.
